summary: Iteration 45 - Practice-to-AI bridge and UX refinements testing complete. All features verified: practice-specific chat with context badge, status-aware suggestions, Consulenza loading reassurance, navigation label consistency, and AI-to-catalog mapping.

details: 'Chiedi a Herion' title visible in practice detail chat section
'Supporto su questa pratica' subtitle visible below title
'Contesto attivo' green badge visible (data-testid='chat-context-badge')
Chat section correctly positioned in right column of practice detail
Chat suggestions visible when no chat history exists
Suggestions include: 'Cosa devo fare adesso?', 'Qual e lo stato attuale?', 'Manca qualcosa per procedere?'
Suggestions are clickable and populate the chat input
Sending a chat question stays on the same practice page
URL does not change after sending chat message
Chat response appears in the same chat section
Loading state shows 'Herion sta analizzando la pratica...' message
Loading spinner visible during AI response generation
'Documenti mancanti' section visible when practice has missing documents
Shows specific missing documents: 'Mancano: Documento di identita, Dichiarazioni fiscali'
Hint appears in guidance card area
Submit button shows 'Analisi in corso...' during loading
Reassurance message visible: 'Herion sta analizzando la tua situazione e cercando il percorso piu adatto per te...'
Loading message has data-testid='consulenza-loading-msg'
Sidebar shows 'Consulenza' (not 'Consulenza rapida')
Sidebar shows 'Servizi' (not 'Aree operative')
Sidebar shows 'Messaggi' (not 'Comunicazione')
Sidebar shows 'Attivita AI' (not 'Agenti')
Dashboard quick action shows 'Consulenza' (matches sidebar)
Dashboard quick action shows 'Servizi' (matches sidebar)
Dashboard quick action shows 'Messaggi' (matches sidebar)
POST /api/practices/{id}/chat endpoint works
Returns contextual AI response with id, question, answer fields
GET /api/practices/{id}/chat returns chat history as list
POST /api/consulenza/triage endpoint works
Maps user query to catalog procedures correctly
Returns session_id and response with suggestions
Suggestions include practice_id, name, confidence, why, next_step_hint
POST /api/consulenza/refine endpoint works
Accepts session_id and follow_up text
Returns refined suggestions based on additional context

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 45 verified the practice-to-AI bridge improvements: (1) Practice detail page chat now shows 'Chiedi a Herion' with 'Supporto su questa pratica' subtitle and 'Contesto attivo' badge. (2) Chat suggestions are status-specific - for waiting_user_documents shows document-related questions. (3) Sending chat stays on same practice page (no redirect). (4) Chat loading shows 'Herion sta analizzando la pratica...' message. (5) Missing docs hint visible when status=waiting_user_documents with missing docs. (6) Consulenza Rapida loading shows 'Analisi in corso...' button and reassurance message. (7) Navigation labels unified: sidebar and dashboard quick actions use same short labels (Consulenza, Servizi, Messaggi, Attivita AI). (8) Practice chat API POST /api/practices/{id}/chat returns contextual AI response. (9) Consulenza triage API correctly maps user queries to catalog procedures with confidence levels.
